# Kick Dev

## Kick Dev

- [Welcome](https://docs.kick.com/readme.md)
- [Changelog](https://docs.kick.com/changelog.md)
- [App Setup](https://docs.kick.com/getting-started/kick-apps-setup.md): Walkthrough on creating a Kick App
- [OAuth 2.1](https://docs.kick.com/getting-started/generating-tokens-oauth2-flow.md): The Kick OAuth Flow.
- [Scopes](https://docs.kick.com/getting-started/scopes.md)
- [Categories](https://docs.kick.com/apis/categories.md)
- [Users](https://docs.kick.com/apis/users.md)
- [Channels](https://docs.kick.com/apis/channels.md)
- [Channel Rewards](https://docs.kick.com/apis/channel-rewards.md): Channel Rewards APIs allow an app to interact with channel point rewards for a given channel.
- [Chat](https://docs.kick.com/apis/chat.md)
- [Moderation](https://docs.kick.com/apis/moderation.md)
- [Livestreams](https://docs.kick.com/apis/livestreams.md)
- [Public Key](https://docs.kick.com/apis/public-key.md)
- [KICKs](https://docs.kick.com/apis/kicks.md)
- [FAQs](https://docs.kick.com/apis/faqs.md): Frequently asked questions about Kick Public API and Kick Apps.
- [Introduction](https://docs.kick.com/events/introduction.md)
- [Webhooks](https://docs.kick.com/events/webhook-security.md)
- [Subscribe to Events](https://docs.kick.com/events/subscribe-to-events.md)
- [Webhook Payloads](https://docs.kick.com/events/event-types.md): Request body payloads for Webhook API requests
- [Organization Management](https://docs.kick.com/organizations/organization-management.md): Guide to registering and managing organizations on Kick for developers, including Drops, campaigns, and member management.
- [Guide](https://docs.kick.com/drops/drops-guide.md): Guide to setting up and running Drops campaigns on Kick for game developers and organizations.
- [FAQs](https://docs.kick.com/drops/drops-faqs.md): Frequently asked questions about Drops for viewers on Kick - how to earn, claim, and troubleshoot rewards.
- [Contributing](https://docs.kick.com/how-do-i-contribute/contributing.md): How to make a contribution to the Kick Dev ecosystem
- [Community Driven Projects](https://docs.kick.com/how-do-i-contribute/community-projects.md)


---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.kick.com/readme.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
